name: Chocolate Cream Easter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 package Betty Crocker white frosting mix
1/2 cup chopped candied fruit or 1/2 cup chopped nuts (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the frosting mix with soft butter, flour, and hot water in a large bowl. If desired, add chopped fruit or nuts.
2. Knead the mixture on a lightly dusted work surface for 20-30 turns until smooth.
3. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape them into egg-like forms.
4. Chill the shaped eggs for at least 30 minutes.
5. To decorate, dip each egg into the Chocolate Fudge Frosting Mix, swirling to create a design on top of the frosting.
6. Keep the Chocolate Fudge Frosting Mix warm over hot water while decorating the eggs.
Note: Do not preheat or heat anything excessively; simply keep the frosting mix warm during use.
